title: Sonnet 5 is LIVE And It Competes With Opus
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 is a new release from Anthropic that significantly improves on the previous Sonnet series and approaches Opus 4.8 performance on benchmarks. The video evaluates whether these benchmark gains translate to real-world task performance.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Sonnet 5, a model that improves on the prior Sonnet series and approaches Opus 4.8 on benchmarks. The central question is whether those benchmark gains hold up in real-world task performance rather than test scores alone. The evaluation matters because a mid-tier model reaching near-Opus results would shift the cost and capability tradeoff across Anthropic's lineup.
